---
title: "My Projects"
---

### Sales Analysis 
```{python}

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

data = {"apple": 100, "microsoft": 150, "google": 120}
names = list(data.keys())
values = list(data.values())

fig, axs = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(9, 3), sharey=True)
axs[0].bar(names, values, color=["red", "blue", "green"])

plt.show()
```
